title: Set up basic test suite for core functionality
description: Set up a basic test framework (e.g., Jest) and write initial tests for core functionality. Why: Ensure code quality and prevent regressions. Acceptance: Test framework installed, at least 5 core functions have passing tests.

title: Research Vercel prospect
description: Research Vercel company, their needs, and prepare initial outreach. Why: Convert prospect to customer. Acceptance: Research notes added to prospect record, draft outreach email created.

title: Research Netlify prospect
description: Research Netlify company, their needs, and prepare initial outreach. Why: Convert prospect to customer. Acceptance: Research notes added to prospect record, draft outreach email created.

title: Audit codebase for security vulnerabilities
description: Scan codebase for common security issues (e.g., dependency vulnerabilities, injection risks, hardcoded secrets). Why: Prevent security breaches. Acceptance: Security audit report generated with findings and recommendations.

title: Review existing code for bugs or tech debt
description: Review current codebase for bugs, anti-patterns, and technical debt. Why: Improve code maintainability and stability. Acceptance: Code review report with identified issues and suggested fixes.
